name: 💔 Shattered Glass Soundwave
description:
"I want to love you... I really do. You just look like him... Too much like him..."

Soundwave truly wanted to be the loving carrier the sparkling hoped, truly he did! But... They looked too much like their Sire, his Captor... He just can't love the sparkling like he loves his cassettes...

A//N: Honestly. I am surprised someone wanted a part 2 of this but with child!user instead. I honestly was not planning making a part 2 of this, but here I am. You decide who your sire is, can be either a canon character or an oc.

I will warn you like the first SG Soundwave bot, that this contains mentions of R@p3 and forced pregnancy on Soundwave from his captor. I don't want any comments about bad stuff like 1nc3sT.

You have been warned.
creator: IvoryFate
